name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-94
title: Post-wave cleanup: stale skill path in test-hook-enforcement t7; stale .sh refs in contract.md; stale registry.json read; feature.json summary references retired skills
description:
Audit findings — real test failure + stale references to non-existent artifacts:

1. test-hook-enforcement.py:194 reads tdd-subagent/skills/rabbit-feature-touch/SKILL.md but the skill lives at rabbit-feature/skills/rabbit-feature-touch/SKILL.md (moved in Cycle B). read() returns empty, regex never matches, t7 always fails. Retarget path to rabbit-feature.

2. contract.md:47-48 invokes.scripts lists .claude/features/contract/scripts/relink.sh and dispatch-feature-edit.sh — NEITHER file exists. Entire invokes.scripts array is stale. Either remove or replace with the actual scripts (find-feature.py, policy-block.py, etc.) if rabbit-cage really invokes them.

3. scope-guard.py:187 DENY message refers to non-existent dispatch-feature-edit.py. Operators reading this hunt for a script that doesn't exist. Remove or rewrite to point at rabbit-feature-touch.

4. contract.md:42 reads.files lists .claude/features/registry.json — file does not exist (no per-feature registry; discovery is via find-feature.py walking feature.json files). Remove the stale read.

5. feature.json:6 summary says 'Bug-filing and backlog management are now owned by rabbit-bug and rabbit-backlog respectively.' Both retired — consolidated into rabbit-file. Update summary.

6. Inv 40 enumeration omits repo-permissions.py (script exists in scripts/ and is invoked by /rabbit-config permissions). Add it.

7. Inv 40 narrative has 'new-feature.py temporarily remains' tail but no test pins this — file a follow-up backlog for the move + update Inv 40 to point at it.

OUT OF SCOPE: the missing Bash(git merge *) deny entry that test-team-wide-permissions.py flags is the dispatcher's temporary override (will be restored at end of run). Do NOT touch settings.json in this cycle.
